meta.description: Blackbeard Outcome Ledger — every prediction with signals + actual results

vipData.pattern: NE/Canada 2-3x Southwest. Buy NE + West Coast immediately on any new dates.
PNW/Mountain strongest. Southwest weakest. Buy PNW + Mountain on Leg 2.
Every Leg 1 date sold out. Buy ALL Leg 2 dates immediately.
Haitian diaspora corridor = 3-5x premium (Miami $356, LA $219, DC $181, Brooklyn $198). 5 venue upgrades mid-tour. Nearly gone in LA (4 tix), DC (6 tix), Miami (6 tix), Detroit (11 tix).
Country breakout. Southeast strongest. Scaling up to bigger venues.
Diaspora demand. Arena routing. High listing count = real volume.
Jack Antonoff = consistent demand. Outdoor amphitheater routing.
Game symphony niche. Dallas get-in is 3x Chicago. Theater routing. Limited run.
Nostalgia + festival circuit. High volume resale. Amphitheater routing.
60+ sold out shows. Theater routing. High listing count everywhere.
15th anniversary tour. Nostalgia pricing. NE consistent.
Ricochet tour. Consistent mid-tier pricing.
Metal niche. Consistent $60+ get-in across markets.
Pretty Penny reunion tour. Nostalgia play.
$184 floor set across tour. DC premium ($207). Toronto discount (2.5K cap). 8.4M listeners in 500-1800 cap rooms = massive ratio. Only 8 headline dates. Broker(s) controlling supply.
UK breakout. Ed Sheeran label. $328 at 1,200 cap = highest non-Zara price seen. Need more markets to confirm.
ATL 40-80% above NE. N2 Boston avg $879 = insane premium seats. Paramore frontwoman solo = scarcity.
DC 80% above SF. Barely tours. Grammy winner, Drake collab. Scarcity-driven.
Nearly gone everywhere. DC $177. NYC down to single-digit tickets. Supply evaporating.
Latin Grammy winner. LATAM→US demand. N1 premium ($142 vs $85). Need more markets.
Rarely tours. Nostalgia demand. $213 at 1,150 cap. Need more markets.
90s punk nostalgia. $196 at small room. One market only so far.
WOR$T GIRL tour. Small venue routing. NE premium.
